title: Aged Payables Report Artifact
description: Implement a new 'aged-payables' artifact type for the AI assistant that displays supplier payment aging organized by aging buckets (Current, 1 month, 2 months, 3+ months). Supports both summary view (one row per supplier with aging totals) and detailed view (individual invoices grouped by supplier). Visual indicators highlight overdue amounts.
why: Enable proactive cash flow management by providing clear visibility into payment obligations organized by aging buckets - helping users prioritize payments, maintain supplier relationships, avoid late payment penalties, and understand their payables position at a glance.

tasks.title: Define AgedPayablesInvoice interface
tasks.description: Create AgedPayablesInvoice interface in types.ts for individual invoice line items. Fields: accountCode (string), lineIndex (number), reference (string), date (string YYYY-MM-DD), description (string), threeMonthsPlus (number), twoMonths (number), oneMonth (number), current (number), gst (number), total (number). Follow pattern from LedgerEntry interface.

tasks.title: Define AgedPayablesSupplier interface
tasks.description: Create AgedPayablesSupplier interface in types.ts for supplier summary rows. Fields: code (string), name (string), phone (string optional), threeMonthsPlus (number), twoMonths (number), oneMonth (number), current (number), gst (number), total (number), invoices (AgedPayablesInvoice[] optional - for expandable detail view). Follow pattern from LedgerAccount interface.

tasks.title: Define AgedPayablesData interface
tasks.description: Create AgedPayablesData interface in types.ts for the complete report data. Fields: asAt (string - report date), companyName (string optional), currency (string optional, default NZD), suppliers (AgedPayablesSupplier[]), totals (object with threeMonthsPlus, twoMonths, oneMonth, current, gst, total), generatedAt (string optional). Follow pattern from LedgerReportData interface.

tasks.title: Add 'aged-payables' to ArtifactType union
tasks.description: Add 'aged-payables' to the ArtifactType union type in types.ts (around line 12-25). Add after 'stocktake-report'. Also add AgedPayablesData to the ArtifactData union type (around line 542-555).
tasks.reference: ArtifactType and ArtifactData unions in types.ts

tasks.title: Implement isAgedPayablesData type guard
tasks.description: Create isAgedPayablesData() type guard function in types.ts. Check for 'suppliers' array (using Array.isArray) and 'asAt' string field. Follow pattern from isStocktakeReportData (line 631-633). Export the function.

tasks.title: Create AgedPayablesReport React component - basic structure
tasks.description: Create aged-payables-report.tsx in /packages/ai/app/components/artifacts/. Set up Card structure with header showing report title, company name, 'as at' date. Create table with columns: Code, Phone, Name, 3 months+, 2 months, 1 month, Current, GST, Total. Use defensive coding pattern from department-pnl.tsx for missing fields.

tasks.title: Add visual indicators for overdue amounts
tasks.description: Implement getAgingRowClass() and AgingIndicator helper functions. Red background (bg-red-100/dark:bg-red-950) for 3+ months overdue amounts, amber background (bg-amber-100/dark:bg-amber-950) for 2 months. Use AlertCircle icon for 3+ months, AlertTriangle for 2 months. Follow pattern from stocktake-report.tsx getStockRowClass() and StockStatusIcon().

tasks.title: Implement expandable supplier rows
tasks.description: Add useState for expanded supplier tracking (expandedSuppliers: Set<string>). Create SupplierRow component with chevron toggle when invoices array is present. When expanded, render InvoiceRow sub-rows with same aging columns but AccountCode, LineIndex, Reference, Date, Description fields. Follow collapsible pattern from department-pnl.tsx PnLSectionComponent.

tasks.title: Add summary totals row and footer
tasks.description: Create totals row at bottom of table showing grand totals for each aging bucket, GST, and Total. Style with font-semibold and border-top. Display 'Accounts Payable as at {date}' label matching MoneyWorks format. Add footer with generatedAt timestamp and currency indicator.

tasks.title: Register component in artifact-renderer.tsx
tasks.description: Import AgedPayablesReport and isAgedPayablesData in artifact-renderer.tsx. Add switch case for 'aged-payables' type with type guard check (or use defensive pattern like stocktake-report). Import AgedPayablesData type for casting if using defensive pattern.

tasks.title: TypeScript verification
tasks.description: Run 'bun run typecheck' from repository root to verify all types compile correctly. Fix any type errors. Ensure all imports are using correct paths (@moneyworks/... or ~/...). Verify no circular dependencies introduced.
tasks.notes: TypeScript verification passed for all new code. Pre-existing errors in other packages (canonical, data) are unrelated to this implementation.

tasks.title: Browser testing with sample data
tasks.description: Start web dev server (bun run web). Create test artifact with sample AgedPayablesData matching MoneyWorks format from aged-payables-3.txt. Verify: table renders with correct columns, visual indicators appear for overdue amounts, expandable rows work when invoices provided, totals row displays correctly.

tasks.title: AC verification and story completion
tasks.description: Verify all 8 acceptance criteria are met. Update AC status to 'passed' with evidence. Mark story status as 'completed'. Document any learnings discovered during implementation.

acceptanceCriteria.description: AgedPayablesData interface defined in types.ts with supplier array containing: code, name, phone, aging buckets (current, oneMonth, twoMonths, threeMonthsPlus), gst, and total fields
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: AgedPayablesData, AgedPayablesSupplier, AgedPayablesInvoice interfaces defined in types.ts lines 543-633 with all required fields

acceptanceCriteria.description: AgedPayablesSupplier interface supports optional invoices array for detailed view - each invoice has: accountCode, lineIndex, reference, date, description, aging bucket amounts, gst, and total
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: AgedPayablesInvoice interface (lines 547-570) has all required fields. AgedPayablesSupplier (lines 576-597) has optional invoices?: AgedPayablesInvoice[]

acceptanceCriteria.description: 'aged-payables' added to ArtifactType union in types.ts
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: ArtifactType union (line 26) includes 'aged-payables'. ArtifactData union (line 653) includes AgedPayablesData

acceptanceCriteria.description: isAgedPayablesData() type guard function implemented in types.ts checking for 'suppliers' array and 'asAt' field
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: isAgedPayablesData function (lines 733-735) checks for 'suppliers' and 'asAt' fields with Array.isArray validation

acceptanceCriteria.description: AgedPayablesReport React component displays table with columns: Code, Phone, Name, 3 months+, 2 months, 1 month, Current, GST, Total - matching MoneyWorks report format
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Component created at aged-payables-report.tsx with table headers matching MoneyWorks format (lines 268-280). Registered in artifact-renderer.tsx case 'aged-payables'

acceptanceCriteria.description: Visual indicators implemented: red/warning background for 3+ months overdue amounts, amber for 2 months, progressive urgency styling
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: getAgingRowClass() (lines 37-47) applies red for 3mo+, amber for 2mo. AgingIndicator() (lines 52-60) shows AlertCircle/AlertTriangle icons. Status summary badges (lines 243-264)

acceptanceCriteria.description: Expandable supplier rows when invoices are provided - clicking supplier expands to show individual invoice details with same aging columns
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: useState expandedSuppliers (line 195-197). SupplierRow with chevron toggle (lines 127-184). InvoiceRow sub-component (lines 68-123). Expansion logic (lines 291-306)

acceptanceCriteria.description: Summary totals row displayed at bottom with aging bucket totals and grand total matching 'Accounts Payable as at' figure from MoneyWorks
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: tfoot section (lines 310-349) with NZD Total row and 'Accounts Payable as at' row matching MoneyWorks format. accountsPayableTotal field supported

decisions.description: Used defensive coding pattern from department-pnl.tsx rather than strict type guards, allowing component to render even with partial data
decisions.rationale: AI-generated data structures may vary, and defensive coding provides better UX than rendering nothing

decisions.description: Used nested tbody elements for expandable rows instead of conditional row rendering
decisions.rationale: This approach maintains proper table structure while allowing independent supplier/invoice grouping

learnings.insight: The artifact implementation pattern (types -> type union -> type guard -> component -> renderer registration) is consistent and well-established
MoneyWorks report format uses 'as at' terminology for report dates, preserved in UI to maintain canonical DSL purity

referenceImplementations.reason: Expandable/collapsible sections pattern for supplier detail view
Visual indicators pattern (red/amber backgrounds) for problem items
MoneyWorks aged payables report format with invoice details
